entries.definition:
ʿ-ṣ-f chaff, straw, dried herbage, ears of corn; to ripen; storm, to storm, to blow away, (of wind) to blow. Of this root, four forms occur seven times in the Qurʾan: عَصْف ʿaṣf three times; عَاصِف ʿāṣif twice; عَاصِفَةٌ ʿāṣifatun once and عَاصِفَات ʿāṣifāt once.
عَصْف ʿaṣf I [coll. n.] dry leaves, dry blades (55:12) وَالْحَبُّ ذُو الْعَصْفِ and grain in dry blades II [v. n. used adverbially] storming

625

625
